title: EntityRecord v1
description: Structural schema for the `credentialSubject` of an EntityRecord VC. The schema validates the envelope shape; the per-dataset field set is not statically known.

id.description: Canonical entity URL. Optional duplicate of the JWT `sub`.

fields.description: Projection of the entity record. Field names follow the per-dataset projection config.

expanded.description: Relationship expansions; present only when ?expand= was requested. Keyed by relationship name.
